headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Otis Worldwide, Lowers Price Target to $105
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Nick Housden   maintains Otis Worldwide (NYSE:OTIS) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $110 to $105.

headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on Otis Worldwide, Lowers Price Target to $77

headline: OTIS Q1 Deep Dive: Service Investment and Margin Headwinds Shape Outlook
summary: Elevator manufacturer Otis (NYSE:OTIS) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 6.4% year on year to $3.57 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $15.2 billion at the midpoint came in 1% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.89 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Otis Worldwide Corp (OTIS) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Service Growth and ...
